data.title: GovCon and AEC Professionals Gather for Unanet Champions 2026 to Learn, Connect and Grow in a Defining Moment for Project-Based Businesses
data.description: This year's annual user conference in DULLES, Virginia on April 20, 2026, brought together the Unanet community to focus on advancements in agentic AI. Key highlights included the availability of GrowthStudio, previews of GAUGE and Inspire Report, and discussions on changing industry dynamics. Unanet, recognized as a leader in AI-first ERP, hosted the event, which saw a significant number of participants and provided valuable market insights.

data.title: Intelligent Bio Solutions Initiates Validation Study for Rapid Drug Screening Cartridge Targeting 70% Faster Results
data.description: A recent validation study is focusing on achieving results in under 3 minutes for global roadside testing. This study aims to drastically decrease analysis time from the current 10 minutes typically required. The goal is to target the global roadside testing market and streamline the process to make it more efficient. By reducing the time needed for analysis, this effort is set to enhance the speed and accuracy of testing procedures, which could lead to significant improvements in testing capabilities.

data.title: Anaptys Completes Separation of First Tracks Biotherapeutics and Now Exclusively Manages GSK and Vanda Financial Collaborations
data.description: On April 20, 2026, AnaptysBio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANAB), a company specializing in royalty management, completed the spin-off of its previous biopharmaceutical operations unit, now known as First Tracks Biotherapeutics, Inc.

data.title: Stardust Power receives institutional backing for potential $150M investment boost.
data.description: A new report reveals that the city of New York experienced a record-breaking number of tourists in 2019, with over 66 million visitors flocking to the Big Apple. The data shows a 2.39% increase in tourism compared to the previous year, boosting the city's economy significantly. The report also highlighted the top attractions that drew visitors, including Times Square, Central Park, and the Statue of Liberty. The tourism industry generated over $70 billion in spending, creating jobs and driving growth in various sectors. Additionally, the report noted a rise in international tourists, particularly from China and Europe, contributing to the overall surge in tourism. The city's tourism officials are optimistic about the future, aiming to attract even more visitors in the coming years.

data.title: La-Z-Boy Incorporated Introduces AudioLuxe, a New Premium Audio Furniture Line with Sound by Klipsch
data.description: AudioLuxe makes its debut at the High Point Market, offering a high-end sound experience in La-Z-Boy recliners and motion furniture. This innovation combines luxury and audio technology, enhancing the comfort and entertainment value of the furniture. Visitors at the High Point Market will get to experience this premium sound system firsthand. This integration elevates the audio experience for users, providing a new level of comfort and entertainment. This advancement reflects the company's commitment to merging technology and relaxation.

data.title: Verdent: The World's First AI Engineering Team for Builders
data.description: Verdent, based in Singapore, has enhanced its AI-native software platform for builders to function akin to an AI engineering team. The update now includes functions beyond code generation, incorporating planning, execution, validation, and delivery processes. The company's goal is to address the common challenge faced by individuals in completing projects, which often lies in bridging the gap between concept and execution. Verdent aims to provide a solution that traditionally necessitates a full team. Notably, a photographer in Europe successfully developed a customized e-commerce platform using this advanced software.

data.title: Kiss Partners with Sabrina Carpenter to Debut Exclusive "Pretty Girl Parlour" Speakeasy at 2026 Festival in the Desert
data.description: Visit the exclusive hidden speakeasy at the festival for beauty treatments, cocktails, and a stylish retreat in INDIO, Calif., on April 20, 2026. Kiss Products Inc., a top player in beauty and self-expression, collaborated with pop star Sabrina Carpenter for this venture.
